outputs.patch.diff:
--- a/table_14_3_03.R
+++ b/table_14_3_03.R
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # Table 14-3.03: Responder Analysis
 # Responder defined as >= 50% reduction from baseline in ADAS-Cog11
 
-library(dplyr)
+library(dplyr) 
 library(tidyr)
 library(tibble)
 
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@
 adeff <- adeff %>%
   filter(EFFFL == "Y", 
          ITTFL == "Y",
-         PARAMCD == "ACTOT") %>%
+         PARAMCD == "ACTOT",
+         !is.na(AVAL), !is.na(BASE)) %>%
   mutate(
-    RESPONDER = ifelse(CHG <= -0.5 * BASE, "Responder", "Non-responder")
+    RESPONDER = ifelse((BASE - AVAL) / BASE >= 0.5, "Responder", "Non-responder")
   )
 
@@ -30,7 +30,7 @@
     n_resp = sum(RESPONDER == "Responder"),
     n_total = n(),
     pct = 100 * n_resp / n_total,
-    denom = sum(!is.na(AVAL))
+    denom = n_total
   ) %>%
   ungroup()
 
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@
   trt_data <- filter(adeff, TRT01PN == trt)
   
   # Fisher's exact test
-  test_result <- t.test(
+  test_result <- fisher.test(
     x = trt_data$RESPONDER == "Responder",
-    y = pbo_data$RESPONDER == "Responder"
+    matrix(c(sum(trt_data$RESPONDER == "Responder"), 
+             sum(trt_data$RESPONDER == "Non-responder"),
+             sum(pbo_data$RESPONDER == "Responder"),
+             sum(pbo_data$RESPONDER == "Non-responder")), nrow = 2)
   )
